---
title: "Comparison of NAD-RNA hits from both replicates"
output: html_document
keep_md: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "~/Desktop/NAR_Revision/PhageEpitranscriptomics-main/NAD_captureSeq")
```

```{r load-packages, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(viridis)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape)
library(readxl)
library(pheatmap)
library (RColorBrewer)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(VennDiagram)
```

# 1. Data import and formatting

First, we import the data from both replicates (R1: ONTrun_061; R2: ONTrun_065) and filter for E. coli or T4 phage.

```{r}
df_061 <- as.data.frame(read_delim("Final_df_ONTrun_061.csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE))
df_065 <- as.data.frame(read_delim("Final_df_ONTrun_065.csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE))
df_061_low <- as.data.frame(read_delim("Final_df_ONTrun_061_threshold_0-0002.csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)) # low threshold tables
df_065_low <- as.data.frame(read_delim("Final_df_ONTrun_065_threshold_0-0002.csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)) # low threshold tables


ec061 <- df_061[which(df_061$Entity == "U00096.3"), 9]
ec065 <- df_065[which(df_065$Entity == "U00096.3"), 9]
t4061 <- df_061[which(df_061$Entity == "NC_000866.4"), 9]
t4065 <- df_065[which(df_065$Entity == "NC_000866.4"), 9]

ec061_low <- df_061_low[which(df_061_low$Entity == "U00096.3"), 9]
ec065_low <- df_065_low[which(df_065_low$Entity == "U00096.3"), 9]
t4061_low <- df_061_low[which(df_061_low$Entity == "NC_000866.4"), 9]
t4065_low <- df_065_low[which(df_065_low$Entity == "NC_000866.4"), 9]

```

# 2. Compute Venn diagrams for overlaps

Compute overlap for E. coli and T4 NAD-RNAs among both replicates separately.

```{r}
# E. coli
x <- list(ec061, ec065)

display_venn <- function(x, ...){
  library(VennDiagram)
  grid.newpage()
  venn_object <- venn.diagram(x, filename = NULL, ...)
  grid.draw(venn_object)
}

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

# E. coli low threshold

x <- list(ec061_low, ec065_low)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

x <- list(ec061, ec065_low)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

x <- list(ec061_low, ec065)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

# T4 phage
x <- list(t4061, t4065)

display_venn <- function(x, ...){
  library(VennDiagram)
  grid.newpage()
  venn_object <- venn.diagram(x, filename = NULL, ...)
  grid.draw(venn_object)
}

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

x <- list(t4061_low, t4065_low)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

x <- list(t4061, t4065_low)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

x <- list(t4061_low, t4065)

display_venn(
  x,
  category.names = c("R1" , "R2" ),
  fill = c("#999999", "#E69F00")
)

# 
```
